tasks.subject: Task 1: Swap CDN links and remove IE shiv
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace all Bootstrap 4 and jQuery CDN references in `<head>` with Bootstrap 5.3 equivalents and delete the IE shiv comment block.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html` (head section)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No reference to `bootstrap/4.5.0` anywhere in `index.html`
- [ ] No reference to `jquery` anywhere in `<head>`
- [ ] Bootstrap 5.3.3 CSS loaded from jsDelivr
- [ ] Bootstrap 5.3.3 JS bundle loaded from jsDelivr (single tag)
- [ ] Bootstrap Icons upgraded to 1.13.1
- [ ] IE shiv comment block is gone

**Verify:** `grep -n "bootstrap/4\|jquery\|html5shiv\|bootstrap-icons@1.4" index.html` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n \"bootstrap/4\\|jquery\\|html5shiv\\|bootstrap-icons@1.4\" index.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No bootstrap/4.5.0 CDN reference", "No jquery in head", "Bootstrap 5.3.3 CSS from jsDelivr", "Bootstrap 5.3.3 JS bundle from jsDelivr", "Bootstrap Icons 1.13.1", "IE shiv removed"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Replace jQuery smooth scroll with CSS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove the jQuery smooth-scroll script block at the bottom of `<body>` and replace it with a single `scroll-behavior: smooth` CSS rule.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html` (bottom of body)
- Modify: `style.css` (add one rule at top)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No jQuery CDN reference anywhere in `index.html`
- [ ] No scroll script block in `index.html`
- [ ] `html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }` present in `style.css`

**Verify:** `grep -n "jquery\|scrollTop\|\.animate" index.html` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html", "style.css"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n \"jquery\\|scrollTop\\|\\.animate\" index.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No jQuery CDN in index.html", "No scroll script block in index.html", "html { scroll-behavior: smooth } in style.css"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Migrate Bootstrap 4 data attributes to Bootstrap 5
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update all `data-toggle`, `data-target`, `data-spy`, and `data-offset` attributes to their Bootstrap 5 `data-bs-*` equivalents.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html` (navbar toggler button, body tag)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No `data-toggle` attribute anywhere in `index.html`
- [ ] No `data-spy` attribute anywhere in `index.html`
- [ ] Navbar toggler uses `data-bs-toggle` and `data-bs-target`
- [ ] Body tag uses `data-bs-spy`, `data-bs-target`, `data-bs-offset`

**Verify:** `grep -n "data-toggle\|data-spy\b\|data-offset" index.html` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n \"data-toggle\\|data-spy\\b\\|data-offset\" index.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No data-toggle in index.html", "No data-spy in index.html", "Navbar uses data-bs-toggle and data-bs-target", "Body uses data-bs-spy, data-bs-target, data-bs-offset"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Replace card-columns with projects-grid layout
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the removed-in-Bootstrap-5 `card-columns` class with a custom `projects-grid` class using CSS `column-count`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html` (Projects section container div)
- Modify: `style.css` (replace card-columns rules, add projects-grid default)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No `card-columns` class anywhere in `index.html`
- [ ] No `card-columns` rule anywhere in `style.css`
- [ ] `.projects-grid` has `column-count: 3` at default breakpoint
- [ ] `.projects-grid` has `column-count: 2` inside `max-width: 1300px` media query
- [ ] `.projects-grid .card` has `break-inside: avoid`

**Verify:** `grep -n "card-columns" index.html style.css` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html", "style.css"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n \"card-columns\" index.html style.css", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No card-columns in index.html", "No card-columns in style.css", "projects-grid column-count: 3 at desktop", "projects-grid column-count: 2 in 1300px media query", "break-inside: avoid on .projects-grid .card"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Fix tickets README and close ticket
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Mark `refresh-about-content` and `upgrade-bootstrap-5` as done in the tickets index, and move the ticket file to completed/.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tickets/README.md`
- Move: `tickets/in-progress/upgrade-bootstrap-5.md` → `tickets/completed/upgrade-bootstrap-5.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `refresh-about-content` checkbox is `[x]` in `tickets/README.md`
- [ ] `upgrade-bootstrap-5` checkbox is `[x]` in `tickets/README.md`
- [ ] `tickets/completed/upgrade-bootstrap-5.md` exists

**Verify:** `grep "\[ \]" tickets/README.md` → only items 3 and 4 remain unchecked

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tickets/README.md", "tickets/completed/upgrade-bootstrap-5.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep \"\\[ \\]\" tickets/README.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["refresh-about-content is [x]", "upgrade-bootstrap-5 is [x]", "tickets/completed/upgrade-bootstrap-5.md exists"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
